description: A horizontal rule used as a visual divider between content sections. Available in multiple height variants to control vertical spacing.

FR-01.title: Horizontal Rule
FR-01.description: The block MUST render a visible horizontal line as a section divider.

FR-02.title: Height/Spacing Variants
FR-02.description: The separator MUST support multiple height variants for vertical spacing control.
acceptance: Height includes both the line and surrounding whitespace

default.description: Default height separator with minimal spacing.

accessibility.AC-01: Separator MUST be decorative (role='separator' or aria-hidden if purely visual)
accessibility.AC-02: MUST NOT break content reading flow for screen readers
